articles.title: Road to SA up and running: Washington, Axar deliver with bat and ball at Edgbaston

articles.title: 'Won’t quit, Ayodhya Ram temple donation theft due to SBI laxity': Trust treasurer

articles.summary: Citi Research has left its zero-to-three-month price target for palladium unchanged at $1,500 per ounce, indicating that the metal could see upside over the coming months despite recent market fluctuations. The outlook comes as investors assess the impact of US monetary policy expectations and geopolitical risks on industrial and precious metals.

articles.summary: Delhi University has announced the tentative schedule for undergraduate Extra-Curricular Activities (ECA) quota trials, with physical assessments beginning on July 16. Candidates must check the university website for their allotted trial slots, as no separate notifications will be issued.

articles.title: DHSE Kerala Plus One result 2026 likely to be released today at results.hse.kerala.gov.in: Check complete details here
articles.summary: The Directorate of Higher Secondary Education (DHSE), Kerala, is expected to declare the Plus One (Class 11) Result 2026 on July 15. Students can access their scorecards online using their registration number and date of birth.

articles.title: Why don't antibiotics work against viruses? Understanding bacteria, viruses, and antimicrobial resistance
articles.summary: Competitive Exam explainers | Science and Technology: Antimicrobial resistance is emerging as one of the world's gravest public health threats, fuelled by the widespread misuse of antibiotics for viral illnesses. As resistant microbes become harder to treat, experts warn of rising deaths, longer hospitalisations and escalating healthcare costs.
